title: Improved Redstone
description: A small mod with big effects on speed and interactivity of redstone in minecraft by adding improved versions of redstone items that are 4x+ faster than their vanilla counterparts.
body:
A Minecraft mod that adds new redstone items that are 4x+ faster than the orginal vanilla counterparts with a extra surprise of a RGB panel. The new Improved Redstone items include:
- Improved Redstone Dust
- Improved Redstone Repeater
- Improved Redstone Comparator
- Improved Redstone Torch
- Improved Observer

All of these redstone components have their own crafting recipe to make you as the player to craft them in survival. The RGB panels contain 16 different colors being controlled by the original redstone dust.

These components are more avalible to get in survival after you have created a reliable blaze farm. Another thing about these recipes are that some may use the orange dye as the "coloring" of the improved redstone.
